name: IRC_PHASES_VL
query: SELECT PHASESB.PHASE_ID, PHASESTL.NAME, PHASESTL.DESCRIPTION, PHASESB.CODE, PHASESB.TYPE_CODE, PHASESB.MODULE_ID, PHASESB.SEQUENCE_NUMBER, PHASESB.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, PHASESB.CREATED_BY, PHASESB.CREATION_DATE, PHASESB.LAST_UPDATED_BY, PHASESB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, PHASESB.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM IRC_PHASES_B PHASESB, IRC_PHASES_TL PHASESTL WHERE PHASESB.PHASE_ID = PHASESTL.PHASE_ID AND PHASESTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
